content:
# 登录表单

## 使用场景

标准用户登录页面，包含品牌标识、邮箱/密码输入区域和登录按钮。适用于需要用户身份认证的应用首页或独立登录页。

## 布局结构

垂直居中布局，从上到下依次为：品牌 Logo（image）→ 标题文本 → 邮箱输入框（rect 容器 + text 占位符）→ 密码输入框（rect 容器 + text 占位符）→ 登录按钮（rect + text）。

整体宽度 320px，各元素之间间距 16-24px，居中对齐。

## 节点树示例

```json
{
  "type": "group",
  "id": "login-form-root",
  "name": "登录表单",
  "transform": {
    "position": { "x": 28, "y": 120 },
    "size": { "width": 320, "height": 420 },
    "rotation": 0,
    "opacity": 1
  },
  "zIndex": 0,
  "locked": false,
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "image",
      "id": "login-logo",
      "name": "品牌Logo",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 120, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 80, "height": 80 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "src": "https://example.com/logo.png",
      "objectFit": "contain"
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "login-title",
      "name": "登录标题",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 96 },
        "size": { "width": 320, "height": 36 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "欢迎回来",
      "style": {
        "fontSize": 24,
        "fontWeight": "bold",
        "color": "#262626",
        "align": "center",
        "lineHeight": 1.5
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "login-email-input",
      "name": "邮箱输入框",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 156 },
        "size": { "width": 320, "height": 44 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "stroke": { "color": "#d9d9d9", "width": 1, "style": "solid" },
      "cornerRadius": 8
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "login-email-placeholder",
      "name": "邮箱占位文本",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 12, "y": 168 },
        "size": { "width": 296, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "请输入邮箱地址",
      "style": {
        "fontSize": 14,
        "fontWeight": "normal",
        "color": "#8C8C8C",
        "align": "left",
        "lineHeight": 1.5
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "login-password-input",
      "name": "密码输入框",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 216 },
        "size": { "width": 320, "height": 44 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "stroke": { "color": "#d9d9d9", "width": 1, "style": "solid" },
      "cornerRadius": 8
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "login-password-placeholder",
      "name": "密码占位文本",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 12, "y": 228 },
        "size": { "width": 296, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "请输入密码",
      "style": {
        "fontSize": 14,
        "fontWeight": "normal",
        "color": "#8C8C8C",
        "align": "left",
        "lineHeight": 1.5
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "login-button-bg",
      "name": "登录按钮背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 292 },
        "size": { "width": 320, "height": 44 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#1677FF" },
      "cornerRadius": 8
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "login-button-text",
      "name": "登录按钮文本",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 304 },
        "size": { "width": 320, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "登录",
      "style": {
        "fontSize": 16,
        "fontWeight": "bold",
        "color": "#ffffff",
        "align": "center",
        "lineHeight": 1.5
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 设计要点

- Logo 居中展示，尺寸 80×80px
- 输入框高度 44px，圆角 8px，浅灰色边框
- 登录按钮使用主色 #1677FF，白色文字，与输入框等宽
- 各元素纵向间距 16-24px，整体视觉重心偏上
- 占位文本使用次要文字颜色 #8C8C8C

metadata.description: 标准登录表单：品牌 Logo + 邮箱输入 + 密码输入 + 登录按钮
